headline: Is Comcast (CMCSA) Offering Value After DCF And P/E Suggest Large Upside To Fair Value?
summary: Investors may be asking whether Comcast at around US$29.37 is starting to look like value, or if the market is pricing it fairly. The stock has moved 3.8% over the last 7 days and 1.2% over the last 30 days, while year to date it is slightly lower at 0.6% and about 5.1% lower over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on Comcast's position in US telecoms and media, including its role as a major broadband provider and owner of content assets. These factors continue to shape investor...

headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: As you will hear from Mike, Jason S. Armstrong, and Steve, it is still early, but the initial results are encouraging.  The opportunity in front of us now is making sure customers really see that and feel it in every experience and touch point.  Whether it is the mobile launch we just announced, the Olympics, the Super Bowl, or Xfinity's new membership program, these are opportunities to show up for consumers in a way that only Comcast Corporation can, and connect that across all of our growth businesses.

headline: Comcast beats estimates on sports boost, easing broadband losses
summary: Comcast topped Wall Street expectations for the first quarter on Thursday, as a blockbuster sports lineup boosted subscriber growth ‌and engagement, while its core broadband business lost fewer customers than anticipated.  Shares ‌of the company jumped nearly 8% in premarket trading.  A packed live sports calendar, capped by ​the Winter Olympics, Super Bowl and the return of National Basketball League games, drove stronger advertising sales and user growth at the company's Peacock streaming service.
